SEARCH
Package pl.edu.wit.studentmanager.model

Class GroupAssignment

java.lang.Object
pl.edu.wit.studentmanager.model.GroupAssignment
public final class GroupAssignment extends Object
Reprezentuje przypisanie jednego studenta do jednej grupy.
